title: Pure Mining Dimension
description: A Mining Dimension with ores and trees nothing more and nothing less.
body:
Pure Mining Dimension

This is a simple mining dimension with nothing but ores and trees for balanced mod packs on fabric.

By default, to craft a mining dimension portal you need 8 emeralds and cracked stone bricks for each portal block, and you can light it with a diamond pickaxe

This mod will allow you to mine in another dimension freely without messing up the overworld or have a distraction free simple plains biome to build without any structures to mess up anything.

F.A.Q

Q: Can I use this in my modpack?

A: Yes as long as it is on curseforge/modrinth.

Q: Do you support Ukraine

A: Yes.
